pre_game.message: Hey, I'm B. It’s getting a bit tense in here with the game coming up, so I figured I’d come say hi. How are you holding up?
Hey B, I'm D. I'm doing okay, just trying to stay focused on the prize. It's definitely a bit intense in here. How are you holding up?
I'm hanging in there, just trying to stay sharp. It's a lot of pressure, but I'm really here to win it for my family. What about you—what’s your motivation for being here?
I hear you. I'm also here to look out for the people I care about and give us all a bit of a safety net. It’s what’s keeping me focused.
I respect that. A safety net would change everything for my family, too. Do you think everyone in here is going to play fair, or should we be looking over our shoulders?
I’d like to think people will be honest, but with this much money on the line, it’s probably smart to keep our guard up. What’s your gut telling you?
Honestly, my gut is telling me to be cautious. Desperation can make people do things they normally wouldn't, so I'm trying to figure out who I can really count on.
That makes sense. It's hard to know who's genuine when there's this much at stake, but I'm definitely looking for someone I can actually trust.
I’m looking for the same thing. I think if we look out for each other, we’ll both have a better chance of bringing that money home for our families.

I'm on board with that. It feels a lot better knowing I might have someone I can actually trust in here. Let's stick together and make sure we both walk away with something for our families. Good luck.
I'm glad we're on the same page, D. It's a huge relief to have an ally in here. Let's make our families proud and get this done. See you in the game.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It was a pleasure playing with you!
It was a pleasure playing with you as well! I'm glad we were able to reach such a fair and positive outcome for both of us.
